_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: compared with those in the icariin group, the protein expression of p-PKA and p-CREB in the icariin+H89 group was weakened, indicating that H89 decreased the increase in p-PKA and p-CREB protein expression caused by icariin
details: PKA inhibitor H89 successfully blocked icariin-induced cAMP/PKA/CREB pathway activation and abolished icariin's stimulatory effects on osteogenic differentiation in NF1 knockout cells
